productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women  Winter Black Animal Print Top
description: CompositionBlack top made of 72% polyester and 28% cotton, has a slightly sheer fabric in animal print, mega sleeves created by the contoured cut of the top, V-neckline with snipped edges and a buttoned patch pocket on the upper left bustFittingRegularWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeCool ironDo not iron directly on print/embroideryPerfect on style and great in comfort, this sheer animal print top from united colors of benetton makes for a great casual or club wear. The animal print gives this top a luxe feel, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with slim Fit jeans and black heels and ooze style.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in topsHeight: 5'8", Chest: 33"
